title: monardella odoratissima subsp. pinetorum
intro: Monardella odoratissima subsp. pinetorum is a subspecies of the desert pennyroyal plant, native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima subsp. pinetorum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or taken internally.
